claim_boundary: Open-development causal diagnostics for a sequence and label-free-monomer surrogate of independent 8X6B/9E6Y computational Docking geometry only; not binding, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, sealed V4-F evidence, submission truth, or an independent model-promotion decision. V1.1 only hardens null validity; it does not alter or reinterpret frozen V1 results.

HOTSPOT_INTERFACE_MASK_SWAP.transform: Within each receptor, exchange hotspot_mask and interface_mask at fixed target positions; do not alter node features, topology, logits, scalar predictions, or receptor keys. In the same frozen-model pass, also score a preregistered matched-cardinality/matched-prevalence spatial-position null bank derived from the clean masks.
HOTSPOT_INTERFACE_MASK_SWAP.primary_effect_surface: contact_score_R8/R9 and the frozen contact-aware meta prediction

RECEPTOR_CONFORMER_SWAP.transform: Exchange complete 8X6B and 9E6Y target graph payloads while receptor keys, conformer embeddings, and R8/R9 output roles remain fixed.
RECEPTOR_CONFORMER_SWAP.primary_effect_surface: direct R8/R9 alignment and exact-min Rdual

TARGET_RESIDUE_FEATURE_PERMUTATION.transform: Independently permute target node-feature rows per receptor; leave adjacency, edge features, hotspot/interface masks, receptor keys, and conformer embeddings fixed.
TARGET_RESIDUE_FEATURE_PERMUTATION.primary_effect_surface: direct R8/R9, exact-min Rdual, and contact summaries

CONTACT_LABEL_WITHIN_PARENT_DONOR_SHUFFL.transform: Inside each current inner-train or outer-train partition, deterministically derange the complete contact payload among candidates sharing parent_framework_cluster. Held-out rows are never donors and scalar labels/sequence/monomer inputs remain on the recipient.
CONTACT_LABEL_WITHIN_PARENT_DONOR_SHUFFL.primary_effect_surface: contact-supervision transfer into the shared encoder and downstream scalar/meta performance

NO_CONTACT_META_EVIDENCE.transform: Omit contact_score_R8/contact_score_R9, refit the same constrained fold-local meta formula with beta_C fixed to zero, and keep clean E_SHARED base predictions.
NO_CONTACT_META_EVIDENCE.primary_effect_surface: incremental label-free contact evidence in the primary stack

nested_comparison.contact_shuffle_power_audit_partition_sc: current inner-train or current outer-train only

paired_parent_bootstrap.degradation_statistic: clean_metric-minus-perturbed_metric for Spearman; perturbed_metric-minus-clean_metric for errors

composite_claims.CONTACT_MECHANISM_EVIDENCE: HOTSPOT_INTERFACE_MASK_SWAP passes together with its matched-cardinality/prevalence position-null gate, CONTACT_LABEL_WITHIN_PARENT_DONOR_SHUFFLE passes after every partition payload-power audit, and NO_CONTACT_META_EVIDENCE passes
composite_claims.FULL_TARGET_CONTACT_CAUSAL_SUPPORT: all five perturbation gates pass, the mask matched-prevalence conditional-randomization gate passes, and every donor-shuffle partition power audit passes

decision_boundary.failed_causal_gate_effect: Withhold the corresponding target/contact-mechanism claim; do not rewrite formal predictive metrics.
decision_boundary.passed_causal_gate_effect: Permit only the named open-development causal-sensitivity claim; experimental blocking and sealed-test claims remain prohibited.

versioning.reason: Add a matched-cardinality/matched-prevalence spatial mask null and a fail-closed donor-recipient contact-payload distance/power audit.

MATCHED_CARDINALITY_PREVALENCE_MASK_POSI.construction: For every receptor and null replicate, jointly permute the two-column clean [hotspot_mask, interface_mask] row payload across target positions. This preserves exact hotspot cardinality, interface cardinality, per-mask prevalence, overlap count, and the full 2x2 joint contingency table while destroying residue-position assignment.
MATCHED_CARDINALITY_PREVALENCE_MASK_POSI.conditional_randomization_statistic: Rdual Spearman evaluated with the clean functional mask assignment versus the same frozen predictions rescored under each matched-cardinality/prevalence spatial mask assignment.
MATCHED_CARDINALITY_PREVALENCE_MASK_POSI.role: Mandatory scale-controlled localization null; not a sixth promotion endpoint.

DONOR_RECIPIENT_CONTACT_PAYLOAD_DISTANCE.scope: Run independently for every inner-train and outer-train donor mapping before optimizer/model initialization.
DONOR_RECIPIENT_CONTACT_PAYLOAD_DISTANCE.distance: Per recipient-donor mean of field-normalized L1/Hamming distances over the complete contact payload; numeric values are required finite and shape-compatible. Supervision-only and complete-payload distances are both reported.
DONOR_RECIPIENT_CONTACT_PAYLOAD_DISTANCE.reference_power: Compare mapped supervision distance with all eligible non-self same-parent supervision distances in the same current train partition.
DONOR_RECIPIENT_CONTACT_PAYLOAD_DISTANCE.failure_policy: Any missing field, nonfinite value, incompatible shape, cross-parent/self donor, threshold failure, or absent audit receipt fails closed before training.
